Docs.title: Connect your first skill in minutes
Docs.description: Learn the core workflow, copy a safe MCP configuration, understand available tools, and see why protected content stays behind authentication.
Docs.quickstartDescription: Go from an account to a discoverable skill in three visible steps.

account.title: Create an account and API key
account.description: Sign in to the dashboard and create a separate key for the client you plan to connect.

configure.title: Add the MCP server
configure.description: Open your agent client's MCP settings and add the OceanSkill endpoint with your key as authorization.

verify.title: Verify skill discovery
verify.description: Ask the client to list available OceanSkill skills, then open one public detail page to compare its version.

Docs.configDescription: Use placeholders locally. Never commit a real API key to Git.
Docs.copyHint: Replace the endpoint and key with values from your dashboard.
Docs.toolsDescription: OceanSkill currently exposes these workflow-level tools.

search.name: search_skills
search.description: Search active public catalog metadata by a user query.

list.name: list_purchased_skills
list.description: List skills available to the authenticated account.

content.name: get_skill_content
content.description: Request protected content for a specific active skill version.

Docs.securityDescription: Public pages help people evaluate a skill. Authentication, RLS, key checks, credits, and usage records protect the instructions delivered to an agent.

securityPoints.public: Public: title, description, domain, compatibility, release, and license.
securityPoints.private: Protected: full SKILL.md instructions and private artifacts.
securityPoints.owner: Owner-scoped: API keys, credits, orders, and usage events.

troubleshooting.auth: 401 or invalid key: confirm the key is active and belongs to the current account.
troubleshooting.empty: No skills returned: remove filters and confirm the catalog contains active releases.
troubleshooting.credits: Insufficient credits: open the dashboard and review balance and recent MCP usage.

Docs.ctaDescription: Create your account, review the marketplace, then use OceanGuide if you get stuck.
